title: Resilient ImageGen
summary: Stabilize multi-image runs with serial jobs, capability-aware backend routing, retry policy, recoverable handoff, and a reviewable manifest.
user_needs: generate several images without losing progress when ImageGen fails
retry transient ImageGen network errors safely
resume an interrupted image generation batch
route image jobs across Computer Use, built-in generation, manual handoff, or local rendering
decide when a separately confirmed CLI or API fallback is justified
